PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\("files/Properties/all-properties.csv", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); Write-Output "Total lines: $\($content.Count\)"; Write-Output "Header:"; Write-Output $content[0]; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "First 3 data rows:"; for \($i = 1; $i -le 3 -and $i -lt $content.Count; $i++\) { Write-Output $content[$i] })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("files/Properties/all-properties.csv"\); Write-Output "Total bytes: $\($bytes.Length\)"; Write-Output "First 50 bytes \(hex\): $\(\($bytes[0..49] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }\) -join ' '\)"; $cp1251 = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\(1251\); Write-Output "First 200 chars as cp1251:"; Write-Output $cp1251.GetString\($bytes[0..199]\))

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== specs/ ==="; Get-ChildItem specs -File | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.Name\)" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== specs/_foundations/ ==="; Get-ChildItem specs\\_foundations -File | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.Name\)" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== specs/design-system/ ==="; Get-ChildItem specs\\design-system -File | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.Name\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Node processes ==="; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N='CPU_s';E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}}, @{N='Mem_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== ngrok processes ==="; Get-Process ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Listening on port 3000 ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "app\\api\\leads" -Directory | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem "app\\api\\leads\\debug" -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("$\(\(Get-Location\).Path\)\\", ""\) })
